parameters.subject: Add Shifts in Sheet - RAH Shift Reminders Workflow
parameters.bodyContent:
=There are no scheduled shifts in the shift reminders google sheet starting {{ new Date(new Date().setDate(new Date().getDate() + 1)).toLocaleDateString('en-CA') }}.
Please review the schedule, and add shifts to the following sheet accordingly before tomorrow at 11 AM.
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1wsO8LjLsNKMrL8IhWmIwsL5bsJq-VhKoIXdeQYRqmRI/edit?usp=sharing
Thank you.
